title: Poster-first Prism Stage

user_preferences.reduced_motion: Render the poster only; never autoplay camera or object motion.
user_preferences.webgl_unavailable: Keep the semantic fallback figure visible and do not retry rendering.
user_preferences.low_power: Use the poster at device pixel ratio 1 and defer all interactive scene code.

implementation_notes: If an interactive glTF is added, use Draco or Meshopt geometry compression and KTX2 textures.
Load the scene only after the poster has painted and only when it is near the viewport.
The scene must never contain the only representation of essential product information.
